name: vendor.openwop.rust-hello
description: Reference WASM node pack proving RFC 0008 ABI v1 works end-to-end across an independent toolchain (Rust → wasm32-unknown-unknown). One node type: vendor.openwop.rust-hello.greet.

nodes.label: Greet
nodes.description: Returns a personalized greeting. Inputs: {name: string}. Output: {greeting: string}.
